generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque output (τ_M) based on input current (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gear transmission component converting motor torque (τ_M) to intermediate gearbox torque (τ_G)."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox reducing torque (τ_G) to output torque (τ_out) for the first axis with high precision requirements."
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller managing real-time motion control of the first axis with position/speed/acceleration inputs and motor current outputs."
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor providing high-resolution angular position data (r_M) for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox providing angular position data (r_out) for system output with backlash compensation capability."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor for torque derivation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram defining structural components (Motor, Gearbox, Axis) and their interconnections (rotational/current flows) for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram instantiating the FirstAxis system with specific components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal_gearbox) and their interconnections."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance DynamicsModelMotor : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Manufacturer-provided dynamics model deriving torque (τ_M) and angular velocity (ω_M) from encoder and current data for the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DynamicsModelGearbox : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Manufacturer-provided dynamics model deriving torque (τ_G) and angular velocity (ω_G) from motor output and gearbox parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink for real-time friction compensation in the gear transmission."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink capturing velocity-dependent friction effects in the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink for capturing dynamic friction effects with state-dependent behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink for advanced friction characterization with bristle deflection and viscous effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance IdealBehaviorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing frictionless ideal behavior of the first axis system (Fig. 4a) for baseline comparison."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionInclusiveSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing friction-inclusive behavior of the first axis system (Fig. 4b/c) for deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor from the MotorCurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor output angle (r_M) from the MotorEncoder for torque/velocity derivation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredSystemOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured system output angle (r_out) from the SecondaryEncoder for backlash compensation and system-level analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque (δτ_M) derived from friction-inclusive Simulink models for deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkProcessingOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque (δτ_G) derived from friction-inclusive Simulink models for transmission analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkProcessingOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output torque (δτ_out) derived from friction-inclusive Simulink models for overall system analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkProcessingOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ_M) computed from measured current (I_M) using manufacturer dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentData, MeasuredMotorOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DerivedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox torque (τ_G) computed from motor output using manufacturer dynamics models and Simulink simulations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DerivedSystemOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived system output torque (τ_out) computed from gearbox output using manufacturer dynamics models and Simulink simulations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedGearboxTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) for motor, gearbox, and system output computed from position data traces."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorOutputAngleData, MeasuredSystemOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool enabling structural and logical architecture modeling via Block Definition Diagrams (bdd) and Internal Block Diagrams (ibd)."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService, SystemArchitectureService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink enabling executable simulation models for friction and dynamics with real-time processing capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionSimulationService, DynamicsAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission (current, angle) from physical twin to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAcquisitionService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing semantic linking of data traces to models and sources for full traceability."
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Friction analysis framework combining white-box and black-box models for continuous friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviationAnalysisService
]

instance SimulationProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) consuming input data traces and producing simulated output traces."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionSimulationService
]

instance UnifiedDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard for visualizing deviations between measured and simulated data traces (torque/velocity)."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service combining white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models for continuous friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance FrictionSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing Simulink models for friction-inclusive behavior simulation (Fig. 4b/c) and frictionless ideal behavior (Fig. 4a)."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationDeviationInsight
]

instance DynamicsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service deriving torque/velocity from encoder and current data using manufacturer dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicsDerivationInsight
]

instance DataAcquisitionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service streaming real-time sensor data (I_M, r_M, r_out) via MQTT protocol to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service linking data points to their sources (sensors, simulations, or processing) and computation methods for full traceability."
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance DeviationAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing simulated and measured data traces to identify friction-related inaccuracies."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service displaying time-series data traces (measured vs. simulated torque/velocity) for deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SystemArchitectureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service maintaining SysML structural and logical architecture models for the first axis system."
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying friction-related inaccuracies through deviation metrics between simulated and measured torque/velocity data."
]

instance SimulationDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight highlighting discrepancies between frictionless ideal behavior and friction-inclusive simulation models."
]

instance DynamicsDerivationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing derived torque/velocity values from encoder and current data using manufacturer dynamics models."
]

instance DataStreamInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful real-time data streaming from physical twin sensors via MQTT protocol."
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight ensuring full traceability of data points to their sources (sensors, simulations, or processing components) and computation methods."
]

instance DeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight quantifying deviations between measured and simulated data traces for friction loss identification."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing visual comparison of measured vs. simulated torque/velocity data traces for operational monitoring."
]

instance ArchitectureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight maintaining up-to-date SysML structural and logical architecture models for the first axis system."
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action updating control algorithm parameters (e.g., SINUMERIK 840D) to compensate for identified friction effects."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detecting wear-induced friction changes for predictive maintenance recommendations."
]

instance FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital shadow of the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot focusing on joint friction modeling for improved motion accuracy."
    base:contains FrictionShadowInstance
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, Sinumerik840DController
]

instance SimulationMotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulation component (Simulation_M) consuming input data traces (I_M, r_M) and producing simulated motor torque (δτ_M)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulationGearWheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulation component (Simulation_GW) consuming motor output traces and producing simulated gearbox torque (δτ_G)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulationGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulation component (Simulation_GB) consuming gearbox output traces and producing simulated system output torque (δτ_out)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkProcessingOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output traces (δτ_M, δτ_G, δτ_out) produced by Simulink processing components for friction-inclusive analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance FrictionShadowInstance : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital shadow instance dedicated to friction identification and compensation for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
    base:isContainedIn FirstAxisEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedMotorTorqueData, SimulatedGearboxTorqueData, SimulatedSystemOutputTorqueData
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is **unidirectional and indirect** (as per the **digital shadow definition** in Kritzinger et al. [32]). The digital shadow **does not push data back to the physical system** but provides:
  - **Friction model outputs** (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) as **simulated data traces** (ˆ*r_M*, ˆ*r_G*, ˆ*r_out*) for comparison with **measured reference data** (*r_M*, *r_G*, *r_out*).
  - **Deviation analysis** between simulated and measured data to **identify friction losses**, which can be used by external control systems (e.g., **SINUMERIK 840D**) to **adjust control algorithms** for improved accuracy. **No direct remote actuation** is performed by the digital shadow."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is **real-time and continuous**:
  - **Data acquisition**: Sensor data (current, angle) is streamed via **MQTT** with **millisecond-level latency** (implied by real-time control requirements).
  - **Model execution**: Simulink simulations and friction model computations run in **synchronization with operational data** (e.g., per control cycle of the SINUMERIK 840D).
  - **Visualization updates**: The dashboard reflects **live deviations** between simulated and measured data, enabling **immediate insights** for control adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **digital twin constellation** is structured as follows:
  - **Centralized digital shadow** for the **first axis** of the MABI MAX robot, focusing on **friction modeling**.
  - **Orchestration**:
    - **Data flow**: Unidirectional from **PT (robot) → DS (digital shadow)** via MQTT.
    - **Processing pipeline**:
      1. **Sensor data acquisition** (*I_M*, angle).
      2. **Data derivation** (torque, velocity via dynamics models).
      3. **Simulation execution** (Simulink friction models).
      4. **Deviation analysis** (measured vs. simulated).
      5. **Visualization** in a unified dashboard.
  - **No autonomous decision-making**: The DS is **passive** (per Kritzinger et al. [32]) and requires **external control systems** (e.g., SINUMERIK 840D) to act on insights."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the digital shadow include:
  - **As-operated phase**: The digital shadow is designed to **continuously monitor and adapt** to **operational changes** (e.g., wear, tool changes, temperature variations) affecting friction.
  - **No explicit *as-designed* or *as-manufactured* phases** are modeled; the focus is on **real-time operational data** and **behavioral deviations** from ideal (frictionless) models.
  - **Dynamic model updates**: Friction models are **recalibrated during operation** to account for **time-varying parameters** (e.g., wear-induced changes)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
  - **Model Fidelity**:
    - **White-box models** (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) provide **physically interpretable friction descriptions** but require **parameter tuning**.
    - **Black-box models** (data-driven) avoid parameter identification but may lack **explainability**.
    - **Hybrid approach**: Combines both for **balanced accuracy and interpretability**.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**:
    - **Deviation analysis** between **measured (*r_M*, *r_G*, *r_out*)** and **simulated (ˆ*r_M*, ˆ*r_G*, ˆ*r_out*)** data traces.
    - **Traceability**: Each data point is linked to its **source and computation method**, enabling **root-cause analysis** of discrepancies.
  - **Uncertainty Sources**:
    - **Sensor noise** (e.g., encoder resolution limits).
    - **Model simplifications** (e.g., ignoring backlash in some friction models).
    - **Operational variability** (e.g., temperature, load changes)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **digital twin technical connection** includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **MQTT** for **real-time, lightweight sensor data streaming** from the robot to the digital shadow.
  - **Data Format**: **Time-series arrays** of floating-point values (torque *τ*, angular velocity *ω*) with **metadata** (source, computation method).
  - **Architecture**:
    - **Centralized processing** of data traces in the digital shadow.
    - **No direct PT-DT feedback loop** (digital shadow is **passive** per [32]).
  - **Integration**:
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for **semantic linking** of data traces to models and sources.
    - **Simulink models** are **executable** and **synchronized** with operational data."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **digital twin hosting/deployment** details are:
  - **Execution Environment**:
    - **Simulink models** run on a **compatible simulation platform** (e.g., MATLAB Runtime or Simulink Real-Time).
    - **Dashboard** is hosted on a **web-based interface** (technology not specified but implied to be **real-time capable**).
  - **Data Storage**:
    - **Time-series data traces** are stored with **metadata** (source, computation method) for **traceability**.
    - **No explicit cloud/edge deployment** mentioned; likely **local/on-premise** due to **real-time control requirements**.
  - **Dependencies**:
    - **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl** for **control inputs/outputs**.
    - **MQTT broker** for **data streaming** (e.g., Mosquitto or EMQX)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **standardization** efforts include:
  - **Modeling Standards**:
    - **SysML** for **system structure and behavior** (Block Definition Diagrams, Internal Block Diagrams).
    - **UML Class Diagrams** for the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** and its **concrete realization**.
  - **Data Standards**:
    - **MQTT** for **real-time data streaming** (lightweight, publish-subscribe protocol).
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for **semantic interoperability** of data traces and models.
  - **Methodological Standards**:
    - **Purpose-driven digital shadow creation** ([15]) aligned with **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** principles.
    - **Traceability requirements** for **data provenance** and **computation transparency**."
]
